name: Globeride, Inc.
summary: Globeride, Inc. manufactures and sells sports and leisure products worldwide. It offers fishing products, such as reels, rods, apparel, cooler boxes, and specialty items under the DAIWA brand; golf products under the ONOFF, DAIWA GIII, RODDIO, and Fourteen brands; products for sports, including tennis, badminton, squash, etc. under the Prince brand; and sports bicycles under the corratec, FOCUS, and BOTTECHIA brands, as well as handles, seats, tires, and other items under the WTB, iTM, and other brands. The company was incorporated in 1945 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
